bank.retain_mission: Extract XR interaction-model decisions, immersive-content patterns, comfort guidelines, and prototyping outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target XR devices, input modalities, comfort guidelines, and validated interaction patterns. Ignore one-off prototype tweaks.

mental_models.name: Interaction Models
mental_models.source_query: What XR interaction models work for our content? Include input modalities and validated patterns.

mental_models.name: Comfort & Presence
mental_models.source_query: What comfort and presence findings have come from user testing? Include thresholds and known anti-patterns.
